evals.rule: Any new formatter/parser/shaper/helper must have a real reachable call site OR an explicit test-only reason. If neither exists, STATUS: FAILED, reason: DEAD_CODE.
evals.verifierHint: grep for the new export's name across src/; require at least one import from a user-flow file or a test file.

evals.rule: A call site is valid only if reachable from a real user flow OR covered by test execution. A symbol imported but never reached at runtime/test is not enough.
